title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following roles that language plays in people's lives and societies, then decide which two are most significant.
options: Preserving cultural heritage and minority languages
Enabling international communication and global cooperation
Shaping personal identity and sense of belonging
Providing access to education and economic opportunities
Building bridges between different communities and nations

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to language, identity and communication. Discuss the following roles that language plays in people's lives and societies, then decide which two are most significant. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most significant..
